description: Style NoteIndulge your flip flop fixation to the hilt with these unique slippers from strapless. Epitomise an exaggerated laidback cool look, kiss goodbye to those ugly tan lines when you're living it up at the sunny beaches or taking a walk along the ocean shore. These flip flops are strapless and the footbed sticks to your feet (with a special adhesive) giving you the sensation of walking barefoot - you can even wear these with socks on winter evenings to walk around without dirtying your socks! Think it can't get better than this? These are re-usable -you can wash it and then re-use it (brand's guarantee - the flip flops won't leave your feet sticky even after prolonged use!)Product DetailsRound toed yellow footbed with a reusable washable gel layer that sticks to your feetSingle piece EVA outsole (1 cm thick) with herringbone grooves all over Material and CareEVAWash with soap and water when the adhesive gets weak, then air dry under the sunUse a bristle brush to wash the flip flops
